rulings.Case Title: JAMES CARMICHAEL VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff James Carmichael'S Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Admission; Motion For Monetary Sanctions To Be Issued Against Plaintiff James Carmichael And His Counsel
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, November 2, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Marcal Associates¿ motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories and requests for admissions is denied without prejudice to defendant re-filing the motion if and when (as part of the meet and confer process or through newly-served discovery requests) it re-states its discovery requests so that plaintiff is not burdened by duplicative discovery and questions that are unreasonably narrow. Defendant¿s interrogatories and requests for admissions largely duplicate each other. Moreover, many of the questions ¿ such as separate questions as to malice, fraud and oppression ¿ are so narrow that the burden of responding to them outweighs whatever limited utility there is drafting the questions so narrowly. Defendant¿s request for sanctions is denied. = (220/HEK)
